item.title: Reverse Twist Forging
item.description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates a satisfying method for forging a reverse twist.

media:content.media:title: Reverse Twist Forging
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates a satisfying method for forging a reverse twist.

item.title: Pineapple Twist Technique
item.description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates ornamental blacksmithing with a step-by-step look at the pineapple twist technique.

media:content.media:title: Pineapple Twist Technique
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates ornamental blacksmithing with a step-by-step look at the pineapple twist technique.

item.title: Black Bear Forge: Forging Square Tubing
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a practical approach to forging square tubing in this workshop video.

media:content.media:title: Black Bear Forge: Forging Square Tubing
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a practical approach to forging square tubing in this workshop video.

item.title: Forge vibes with Black Bear Forge
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a forge-focused video with a strong workshop atmosphere.

media:content.media:title: Forge vibes with Black Bear Forge
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a forge-focused video with a strong workshop atmosphere.

item.title: Build a Better Forge
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a simple guide to building a better forge by yourself.

media:content.media:title: Build a Better Forge
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a simple guide to building a better forge by yourself.

item.title: Worn Tools Restored
item.description: Black Bear Forge shows the restoration of old chisels, turning worn tools into a polished finish.

media:content.media:title: Worn Tools Restored
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shows the restoration of old chisels, turning worn tools into a polished finish.

item.title: Forging a Hook with Black Bear Forge
item.description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates the process of forging a hook.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Hook with Black Bear Forge
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge demonstrates the process of forging a hook.

item.title: Projects Don’t Always Go as Planned
item.description: Black Bear Forge shares a project that didn’t turn out quite as imagined, showing the realities of hands-on work.

media:content.media:title: Projects Don’t Always Go as Planned
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shares a project that didn’t turn out quite as imagined, showing the realities of hands-on work.

item.title: Forging simple hardies for the blacksmith shop
item.description: Black Bear Forge shows tool making in the blacksmith shop, focusing on simple hardies.

media:content.media:title: Forging simple hardies for the blacksmith shop
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shows tool making in the blacksmith shop, focusing on simple hardies.

item.title: Forged Iron Skillet Craft
item.description: Black Bear Forge showcases the making of a forged iron skillet designed for everyday kitchen use.

media:content.media:title: Forged Iron Skillet Craft
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge showcases the making of a forged iron skillet designed for everyday kitchen use.

item.title: Turning a hammer into a camp axe
item.description: Black Bear Forge shows the process of turning an average hammer into a camp axe.

media:content.media:title: Turning a hammer into a camp axe
media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge shows the process of turning an average hammer into a camp axe.

item.title: Making a Bird Feed Scoop
item.description: Black Bear Forge creates a bird feed scoop in a blacksmithing project for his wife.

media:content.media:description: Black Bear Forge creates a bird feed scoop in a blacksmithing project for his wife.
